RELATES_TO.description: General association, no specific semantic relationship (default)

IMPLEMENTS.description: Source is a concrete realization of target (abstract → concrete)

PROVES.description: Source provides evidence or demonstration of target

REQUIRES.description: Source depends on or needs target as precondition

CONTRADICTS.description: Source and target are in mutual opposition

EXEMPLIFIES.description: Source is an instance or illustration of target

COMPOSES.description: Source is a building block / part of target

EVOLVES_FROM.description: Source has historical lineage from target

INFERS.description: Source logically derives or concludes target through reasoning

FORMALIZES.description: Source is the mathematical or formal expression of target

DEFINES.description: Source establishes the boundary, scope, or meaning of target

ANALOGOUS_TO.description: Source functions like target in a different domain or abstraction layer

REDUCES.description: Source constrains, narrows, or diminishes target

MITIGATES.description: Source counteracts or diminishes the negative effect of target
